_source: TableManager enigma_field_upgrade (1080 active rows, 36 platforms x 20|40 levels) + enigma_field_hole
_notes: Repeater item id = 47007002 (Field Repeater) for every platform/level.
enhanceValue is cumulative across levels for a given platform (rowId).
fieldType 1-3 platforms cap at 20 levels; fieldType 4-5 cap at 40.
enhanceCapPerStep is the raw cap from enigma_field_hole.max_enhance_value second part; relationship to per-level value is non-linear.
enhanceValue feeds into ebComputeBuffValue indirectly: it raises the deployed beast's effective potential / scales its mainBuff output.
